scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Create a [fine-grained GitHub token](https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new) for one resource owner with only Repository permissions > Metadata: Read-only.

EMBED_SIGNING_KEY.description: Enter a unique random string containing at least 32 characters. It signs public SVG URLs and must not be shared.

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Optional public HTTPS origin. Leave empty to use the Worker request origin; hotlink protection will then remain disabled.
